creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I get this on 6.2: 

gmake[2]: Entering directory `/var/ports/usr/ports/NEW/send/work/send_0.2/libs/libpkixipext' 
cc -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -Wall -O3 -I../../include  -c -o asn1.o asn1.c 
In file included from asn1.c:43: 
../../include/pkixip_ext_asn.h:86: error: syntax error before '*' token 
../../include/pkixip_ext_asn.h:86: warning: type defaults to `int' in declaration of `IPAddressRange_new' 
../../include/pkixip_ext_asn.h:86: warning: data definition has no type or stora 

Can you see if you can get it working on 6.x? For now I've just 
marked it as broken on >6.0
